/sdk/flutter/calling/managing-calls/star.body:
发起通话时先构造 `InvitationInfo`，再放入 `SignalingInfo`。单聊调用 `signalingInvite()`，群聊调用 `signalingInviteInGroup()`。OpenIM Flutter SDK 负责邀请、接受、拒绝和挂断等信令状态；应用仍需使用返回的凭据接入实时音视频媒体引擎。

## 发起单聊通话

```dart
final info = SignalingInfo(
  userID: currentUserID,
  invitation: InvitationInfo(
    inviterUserID: currentUserID,
    inviteeUserIDList: [peerUserID],
    groupID: '',
    roomID: roomID,
    timeout: 30,
    mediaType: 'video',
    sessionType: ConversationType.single,
    platformID: Platform.isIOS ? IMPlatform.ios : IMPlatform.android,
  ),
  offlinePushInfo: OfflinePushInfo(
    title: '视频通话',
    desc: '你收到一个视频通话邀请',
    iOSPushSound: 'default',
    iOSBadgeCount: true,
  ),
);

final credentials = await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager
    .signalingInvite(info: info);
```

### 参数说明

| 字段 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| `userID` | 执行当前信令操作的登录用户 ID。 |
| `inviterUserID` | 本次通话的发起人。 |
| `inviteeUserIDList` | 被邀请用户列表；单聊只放对方一个用户，不要包含当前用户。 |
| `groupID` | 单聊固定为空字符串。 |
| `roomID` | 本次通话的唯一房间标识；后续事件和状态按它合并。 |
| `timeout` | 邀请等待秒数。 |
| `mediaType` | 业务约定的 `audio` 或 `video`。 |
| `sessionType` | 单聊传 `ConversationType.single`。 |
| `platformID` | 当前 Flutter 运行平台，使用 `IMPlatform.ios` 或 `IMPlatform.android`。 |

`InvitationInfo` 的公开字段在 Dart 中均为 nullable，但发起端仍应完整填写本次通话所需字段。`initiateTime` 由信令流程返回或补充，不需要在新邀请中预填。

`offlinePushInfo` 不属于 `InvitationInfo`。通知能否送达仍取决于 OpenIMServer 和移动端推送配置。

Future 成功返回 `SignalingCertificate`，其中 `roomID`、`token`、`liveURL` 和 `busyLineUserIDList` 都可能为空。取得有效凭据后再连接媒体房间；成功不表示被邀请方已经接听。

## 发起群聊通话

群聊只邀请 `inviteeUserIDList` 明确列出的成员，不会因填写 `groupID` 自动邀请全群：

```dart
final groupInfo = SignalingInfo(
  userID: currentUserID,
  invitation: InvitationInfo(
    inviterUserID: currentUserID,
    inviteeUserIDList: selectedGroupMemberIDs,
    groupID: groupID,
    roomID: groupID,
    timeout: 30,
    mediaType: 'video',
    sessionType: ConversationType.group,
    platformID: Platform.isIOS ? IMPlatform.ios : IMPlatform.android,
  ),
);

final credentials = await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager
    .signalingInviteInGroup(info: groupInfo);
```

群聊的 `groupID` 不能为空，`sessionType` 使用 `ConversationType.group`。示例以 `groupID` 作为 `roomID`，方便按群组恢复房间；如果业务自行生成房间 ID，所有参与端必须使用同一值且避免与进行中的房间冲突。先排除空值、当前用户和重复的被邀请者。

`busyLineUserIDList` 只表示部分成员忙线，不应因此中止其他成员的邀请流程。群成员选择和发起权限由应用根据群资料处理，请求失败时直接处理 SDK 错误。

## 接受或拒绝邀请

被邀请方从 `onReceiveNewInvitation` 取得原始 `SignalingInfo`。接受、拒绝、取消和挂断都应沿用这个对象，不要重建只有 `roomID` 的资料：

```dart
final credentials = await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager
    .signalingAccept(info: receivedInfo);

// 用户拒绝时：
await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager
    .signalingReject(info: receivedInfo);
```

`signalingAccept()` 返回 `SignalingCertificate`；取得有效的 `token` 和 `roomID` 后再进入媒体房间。`signalingReject()` 的 Future 成功只表示拒绝请求完成，发起端界面仍由 `onInviteeRejected` 更新。

## 取消或挂断

邀请尚未接通时由发起方取消；通话已建立后由参与者挂断：

```dart
await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager
    .signalingCancel(info: activeInfo);

await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager
    .signalingHungUp(info: activeInfo);
```

这些调用只更新信令状态。应用还需要停止本地采集、断开媒体房间并释放摄像头和麦克风。Future 成功、远端 listener 到达和重新查询是不同阶段；取消、拒绝、超时和挂断应进入同一套按 `roomID` 幂等的清理流程。

## 监听通话状态

`OnSignalingListener` 同时承载邀请生命周期、参与者和流变化。应用初始化通话模块时集中设置一次：

```dart
Future<void> registerCallListener() {
  return OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager.setSignalingListener(
    OnSignalingListener(
      onReceiveNewInvitation: handleIncomingCall,
      onInviteeAccepted: handleInviteeAccepted,
      onInviteeRejected: handleInviteeRejected,
      onInvitationCancelled: handleInvitationCancelled,
      onInvitationTimeout: handleInvitationTimeout,
      onInviteeAcceptedByOtherDevice: handleAcceptedElsewhere,
      onInviteeRejectedByOtherDevice: handleRejectedElsewhere,
      onHangup: handleHangup,
      onRoomParticipantConnected: handleParticipantConnected,
      onRoomParticipantDisconnected: handleParticipantDisconnected,
      onStreamChange: handleStreamChange,
      onReceiveCustomSignal: handleCustomSignal,
    ),
  );
}
```

| Listener | 载荷 | 应用处理 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `onReceiveNewInvitation` | `SignalingInfo` | 展示来电并启动超时计时。 |
| `onInviteeAccepted`、`onInviteeRejected` | `SignalingInfo` | 合并被邀请方的处理结果。 |
| `onInvitationCancelled`、`onInvitationTimeout` | `SignalingInfo` | 关闭尚未接通的界面。 |
| `onInviteeAcceptedByOtherDevice`、`onInviteeRejectedByOtherDevice` | `SignalingInfo` | 当前设备停止响铃并同步其他设备结果。 |
| `onHangup` | `SignalingInfo` | 结束通话并释放媒体资源。 |
| `onRoomParticipantConnected`、`onRoomParticipantDisconnected` | `RoomCallingInfo` | 按 `roomID` 与用户 ID 合并参与者。 |
| `onStreamChange` | `RoomCallingInfo` | 更新参与者媒体流状态。 |

本页是以上 11 个非自定义信令 callback 的完整归属页。`SignalingManager` 只保存一个 listener，后一次设置会替换先前实例；不要在 Widget 的 `build()` 中重复设置。固定 SDK 没有 remove 或 unset API，退出或切换账号时应让应用级分发器停止写入旧状态，并以新账号的完整 listener 覆盖。

`SignalingInfo.invitation` 与 `RoomCallingInfo.roomID` 都可能为空，不能强制解包。先取得有效 `roomID` 再合并；参与者状态同时结合 `groupMemberInfo.userID` 或 `userInfo.userID`，不要使用数组下标或显示名称。

/sdk/flutter/events/overview-events.body:
OpenIM Flutter SDK 通过 listener 推送连接、同步、用户、好友、会话、会话分组、群组、消息和通话变化。各 manager 只保存一个对应 listener；后一次设置会替换 Dart 层此前保存的实例。因此应在应用状态层初始化时组合所有回调，并且每种 listener 只设置一次，不要在 Widget 的 `build()` 或各功能页面中重复设置。

## 集中设置 listener

下面展示应用级组合入口。`handle*` 函数的完整合并逻辑分别放在表格链接的事件归属页面。

```dart
Future<void> registerOpenIMListeners() async {
  await OpenIM.iMManager.userManager.setUserListener(
    OnUserListener(
      onSelfInfoUpdated: handleSelfInfoUpdated,
      onUserStatusChanged: handleUserStatusChanged,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.friendshipManager.setFriendshipListener(
    OnFriendshipListener(
      onBlackAdded: handleBlackAdded,
      onBlackDeleted: handleBlackDeleted,
      onFriendAdded: handleFriendChanged,
      onFriendDeleted: handleFriendDeleted,
      onFriendInfoChanged: handleFriendChanged,
      onFriendApplicationAdded: handleFriendApplicationChanged,
      onFriendApplicationAccepted: handleFriendApplicationChanged,
      onFriendApplicationRejected: handleFriendApplicationChanged,
      onFriendApplicationDeleted: handleFriendApplicationDeleted,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.conversationManager.setConversationListener(
    OnConversationListener(
      onNewConversation: handleNewConversations,
      onConversationChanged: handleConversationsChanged,
      onTotalUnreadMessageCountChanged: handleTotalUnreadChanged,
      onInputStatusChanged: handleInputStatusChanged,
      onSyncServerStart: handleSyncStart,
      onSyncServerProgress: handleSyncProgress,
      onSyncServerFinish: handleSyncFinish,
      onSyncServerFailed: handleSyncFailed,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.groupManager.setGroupListener(
    OnGroupListener(
      onJoinedGroupAdded: handleJoinedGroupAdded,
      onJoinedGroupDeleted: handleJoinedGroupDeleted,
      onGroupInfoChanged: handleGroupInfoChanged,
      onGroupDismissed: handleGroupDismissed,
      onGroupMemberAdded: handleGroupMemberAdded,
      onGroupMemberDeleted: handleGroupMemberDeleted,
      onGroupMemberInfoChanged: handleGroupMemberInfoChanged,
      onGroupApplicationAdded: handleGroupApplicationChanged,
      onGroupApplicationAccepted: handleGroupApplicationChanged,
      onGroupApplicationRejected: handleGroupApplicationChanged,
      onGroupApplicationDeleted: handleGroupApplicationDeleted,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.messageManager.setAdvancedMsgListener(
    OnAdvancedMsgListener(
      onRecvNewMessage: handleNewMessage,
      onRecvOfflineNewMessage: handleOfflineMessage,
      onRecvOnlineOnlyMessage: handleOnlineOnlyMessage,
      onMsgDeleted: handleMessageDeleted,
      onNewRecvMessageRevoked: handleMessageRevoked,
      onRecvC2CReadReceipt: handleC2CReadReceipts,
      onMessageModified: handleMessageModified,
      onChangedPinnedMsg: handlePinnedMessagesChanged,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.messageManager.setCustomBusinessListener(
    OnCustomBusinessListener(
      onRecvCustomBusinessMessage: handleCustomBusinessMessage,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.conversationGroupManager
      .setConversationGroupListener(
    OnConversationGroupListener(
      onConversationGroupAdded: handleConversationGroupAdded,
      onConversationGroupChanged: handleConversationGroupChanged,
      onConversationGroupDeleted: handleConversationGroupDeleted,
      onConversationGroupMemberAdded: handleConversationGroupMemberAdded,
      onConversationGroupMemberDeleted: handleConversationGroupMemberDeleted,
    ),
  );

  await OpenIM.iMManager.signalingManager.setSignalingListener(
    OnSignalingListener(
      onReceiveNewInvitation: handleIncomingCall,
      onInviteeAccepted: handleInviteeAccepted,
      onInviteeRejected: handleInviteeRejected,
      onInvitationCancelled: handleInvitationCancelled,
      onInvitationTimeout: handleInvitationTimeout,
      onInviteeAcceptedByOtherDevice: handleAcceptedElsewhere,
      onInviteeRejectedByOtherDevice: handleRejectedElsewhere,
      onHangup: handleHangup,
      onRoomParticipantConnected: handleParticipantConnected,
      onRoomParticipantDisconnected: handleParticipantDisconnected,
      onStreamChange: handleStreamChange,
      onReceiveCustomSignal: handleCustomSignal,
    ),
  );
}
```

固定版本没有对应的 remove 或 unset API。退出登录、切换账号或销毁状态层时，应停止向旧账号状态和已销毁 Widget 分发回调，并释放应用自己的引用；重新登录后用新账号的完整组合 listener 覆盖设置。

## 事件归属

| 事件范围           | 合并标识                     | 完整处理页面                                                                                  |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 用户资料与在线状态 | `userID`                     | [用户概览](/sdk/flutter/user/overview-user)                                                   |
| 好友和黑名单       | `userID`                     | [处理好友申请](/sdk/flutter/user/managing-friends/manage-friend-requests)                     |
| 会话列表           | `conversationID`             | [获取会话列表](/sdk/flutter/conversation/retrieving-conversations/retrieve-conversation-list) |
| 会话分组           | `conversationGroupID`        | [管理会话分组](/sdk/flutter/conversation/managing-conversation-groups/manage-conversation-groups) |
| 总未读数           | 当前登录用户                 | [管理会话已读状态](/sdk/flutter/conversation/managing-conversations/manage-read-status)       |
| 输入状态           | `conversationID:userID`      | [管理输入状态](/sdk/flutter/message/composing-messages/manage-typing-status)                  |
| 群组               | `groupID`                    | [获取和搜索群组](/sdk/flutter/group/retrieving-groups/retrieve-and-search-groups)             |
| 群成员             | `groupID:userID`             | [获取群成员](/sdk/flutter/group/retrieving-group-members/retrieve-group-members)              |
| 入群申请           | `groupID:userID`             | [处理入群申请](/sdk/flutter/group/managing-group-applications/manage-group-applications)      |
| 新消息             | `conversationID:clientMsgID` | [接收消息](/sdk/flutter/message/receiving-messages/receive-messages)                          |
| 消息删除           | `conversationID:clientMsgID` | [删除消息](/sdk/flutter/message/managing-messages/delete-a-message)                           |
| 消息撤回           | `conversationID:clientMsgID` | [撤回消息](/sdk/flutter/message/managing-messages/revoke-a-message)                           |
| 消息修改           | `conversationID:clientMsgID` | [修改消息](/sdk/flutter/message/managing-messages/modify-a-message)                           |
| 置顶消息           | `conversationID`，消息按 `clientMsgID` | [置顶会话中的消息](/sdk/flutter/message/managing-messages/pin-conversation-messages)           |
| 单聊已读回执       | `conversationID:clientMsgID` | [管理消息已读回执](/sdk/flutter/message/managing-read-status/manage-message-read-receipts)    |
| 自定义业务通知     | 业务协议中的 ID 或幂等键     | [自定义消息与扩展数据](/sdk/flutter/message/composing-messages/custom-message-and-extra-data) |
| 通话               | `roomID`，参与者结合用户 ID  | [发起或处理通话](/sdk/flutter/calling/managing-calls/start-or-handle-a-call)                    |
| 通话自定义信令     | `roomID:eventID`             | [发送自定义信令](/sdk/flutter/calling/sending-custom-signals/send-a-custom-signal)             |

## 监听初始化同步

同步生命周期也属于唯一的 `OnConversationListener`。它描述 SDK 数据同步，不是某个查询 API 的 Future 回调。

```dart
void handleSyncStart(bool? reinstalled) {
  setSyncState(status: 'syncing', progress: 0, reinstalled: reinstalled == true);
}

void handleSyncProgress(int? progress) {
  setSyncState(status: 'syncing', progress: progress ?? 0);
}

void handleSyncFinish(bool? reinstalled) {
  setSyncState(status: 'ready', progress: 100, reinstalled: reinstalled == true);
  reloadVisibleSnapshots();
}

void handleSyncFailed(bool? reinstalled) {
  setSyncState(status: 'failed', reinstalled: reinstalled == true);
}
```

`onSyncServerStart` 用于进入同步状态，`onSyncServerProgress` 更新进度，完成后重新查询当前界面所需快照，失败时记录错误并等待重试或连接恢复。事件增量、查询快照和 Future 完成始终按独立阶段处理。
